ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.25, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ RecordTypeId <> '01267000000Qgu1', /*Rank Ranger*/ $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership",
isblank(text(Product_Sold__c )),
NOT(ISCHANGED(Related_Meeting__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(SalesLoft1__Most_Recent_Cadence_Name__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(DocuSign_Envelope_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Legal_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Quote_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Supplier_Questionnaire_Request_Status__c)), ISBLANK(text( Product_Sold__c ))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to populate the Product Sold field in order to proceed
